Home / Service Areas / Maple Grove

Epoxy-flooring in Maple Grove, MN

Trusted local professionals serving Maple Grove and surrounding communities

Serving Maple Grove, MN

Summit Epoxy Flooring is a top provider for Maple Grove, MN, where 1990s-2000s family developments thrive. Our epoxy flooring solutions are perfect for busy households, offering scratch-resistant, easy-to-clean surfaces that withstand the demands of family life. From playrooms to garages, we create durable, attractive floors that enhance your home's functionality and style. Maple Grove's extreme winters call for flooring that can handle cold temperatures and heavy use. Our epoxy coatings are specially formulated to resist cracking and wear, even in sub-zero conditions. With a variety of colors and finishes available, we help you design a space that reflects your personal taste while providing unmatched durability and protection.

Maple Grove's family-oriented developments and harsh winters make epoxy flooring a practical and stylish solution.

Epoxy-flooring Services in Maple Grove

Residential Garage Floors

Heavy-duty garage protection engineered for Minnesota's harsh winters.

Learn more →

Basement Floor Coatings

Moisture-resistant basement floors that combat Minnesota's high water tables.

Learn more →

Commercial Epoxy Systems

High-traffic floors for Twin Cities businesses that demand durability.

Learn more →

Decorative Metallic Epoxy

Luxury floors that elevate Minneapolis lofts and high-end homes.

Learn more →

Concrete Repair & Resurfacing

Structural solutions for frost-damaged Twin Cities concrete.

Learn more →

Anti-Slip Floor Systems

Safety flooring for Minnesota's icy entryways and pool decks.

Learn more →

Radiant Heat Compatible Floors

Epoxy systems optimized for Minnesota's popular heated floors.

Learn more →
